title: Dreamy Dense Brazilian Cheese Lasagna
description: A rich and creamy Brazilian cheese lasagna featuring yuzu and dashi extract, perfect for a date night dinner
instructions: Preheat the oven to 375 degrees Fahrenheit
Cook the lasagna noodles according to package instructions
In a large skillet, heat the olive oil over medium heat and saute the garlic until fragrant
Add the spinach to the skillet and cook until wilted
In a large bowl, combine the cooked lasagna noodles, brazilian cheese blend, yuzu juice, dashi extract, salt, and black pepper
Add the cooked spinach mixture to the bowl and stir until well combined
Transfer the mixture to a slate tile vessel and top with additional brazilian cheese blend
Bake the lasagna in the preheated oven for 30 minutes, or until the cheese is melted and bubbly
Remove the lasagna from the oven and let it cool for 10 minutes before serving
